title: fix(apps): correct NetSim GitHub author to @smplstuff
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Credit where credit is due
gist.blurb: Fixed a little mix-up in our app showcase to properly credit @smplstuff for building NetSim. We also polished up the featured apps table while we were at it!
gist.summary: Corrected the GitHub author attribution for the NetSim app in the community showcase and fixed rendering issues in the featured apps table.
gist.impact: Community developer @smplstuff now receives proper credit for their NetSim app on the main README and app list.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee mascot fixing a name tag or painting a portrait of a community member. A cozy gallery wall of pixel art apps. The bee is carefully adjusting a label under a picture of a network simulation (NetSim).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, carefully adjusting a name tag under a framed picture of a network simulation on a gallery wall. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
